summary: P3 refactor regression testing for Trading Calculator PRO. Backend: 52/52 pytest tests pass (8 P1 + 10 P2 + 6 NEW P3 + 15 Stripe + 13 trading_calculator) — pytest collect-only confirmed ≥46 tests collected without TypeError after type-hints + DEMO_PASSWORD env var indirection. NEW P3 verifies (a) /api/options/unusual/AAPL returns rows with 16-field schema (symbol/type/strike/expiration/daysToExpiry/volume/openInterest/ratio/iv/premium/bid/ask/last/moneynessPct/isITM/estNotional) — _build_unusual_row + _scan_chain_for_unusual helpers OK; (b) /api/options/market-flow scannedTickers=24 (matches MARKET_FLOW_TICKERS), totalFound>0, results respect max_results & min_ratio/min_volume — _build_market_flow_row + _scan_chain_for_flow + _scan_ticker_flow helpers OK; (c) /api/options/ai-analyze returns analysis (markdown w/ ✅⚠️💡📊 section emoji) + model='claude-sonnet-4-5' — _format_legs_for_prompt + _build_ai_trade_prompt helpers OK (~3-15s response from Emergent LLM); (d) /api/stock/AAPL returns 8-field schema (price/change/changePercent/high52w/low52w/volume='M'-formatted string/sector='Technology'/dividendYield decimal 0-1) — _get_cached_stock + _normalize_dividend_yield + _build_stock_dict helpers OK + 2nd consecutive call hits cache (<5s, identical price); (e) /api/webhook/stripe accepts POST without 5xx (returns 4xx for invalid sig as expected). Regressions PASS: payoff Long Call $150/$5 fee=0.65 → maxProfit=4749.35 maxLoss=-500.65 totalFees=0.65 EXACT; iv-rank/AAPL returns recommendation∈{sell_premium,buy_premium,neutral} with recommendationLabel/Reason ABSENT (i18n migration intact); All 15 Stripe tests pass (monthly/quarterly/annual/lifetime/sepa+klarna implicit, invalid plan rejected with 400 'Plan no válido', status returns transaction_id/payment_status='pending'/plan_id/amount/currency/created_at). Frontend /payment/cancel: React ReferenceError IS FIXED (0 console errors, 0 pageerrors) — useTranslation() now imported & called. HOWEVER, found NEW UI bug: 2 of the 4 fallback strings leak as raw i18n keys into UI ('paymentCancelledTitle_pc01' shows as h2 title and 'viewPlans_pc02' shows as button text) because these keys are NOT defined in /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js (only 'goToDashboard' + 'hasCanceladoElProcesoDe_c37e10' are present). The fallback pattern t('key') || 'Fallback' does NOT work because t() returns the key string for missing keys (truthy) so the || never triggers. Need either to add the missing keys to i18n dict OR change pattern to t('key', { defaultValue }) OR conditional check.

ui_bugs.issue: Raw i18n keys 'paymentCancelledTitle_pc01' and 'viewPlans_pc02' leak as visible text in UI. Fallback pattern `t('key') || 'Fallback'` is broken — t() returns the key string itself when key is missing (truthy), so `|| 'Pago Cancelado'` and `|| 'Ver Planes'` fallbacks never trigger. These 2 keys are NOT in /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js (verified: grep shows only goToDashboard + hasCanceladoElProcesoDe_c37e10 are defined across all 9 languages).

issues: Pre-existing (NOT regression, already in iteration_2/3): LegEditor renders <span> inside <option> — fires React hydration warning. Recommend rendering option label as plain text. Did not re-verify this round; carried over.

action_items: Fix PaymentCancelPage i18n key leak: option A) add `paymentCancelledTitle_pc01` and `viewPlans_pc02` to /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js (all 9 languages, like goToDashboard/hasCanceladoElProcesoDe_c37e10 already are); option B) change pattern to a conditional like `(t('key') !== 'key' ? t('key') : 'Pago Cancelado')`; option C) hardcode the labels (since other strings on the page already use the dict, option A is most consistent).
critical_code_review_comments: P3 helper extraction is clean and correct: _build_unusual_row + _scan_chain_for_unusual produce a stable 16-field schema. _build_market_flow_row + _scan_chain_for_flow + _scan_ticker_flow produce 13-field rows and exactly 24 tickers scanned (MARKET_FLOW_TICKERS list). _format_legs_for_prompt + _build_ai_trade_prompt produce a Spanish prompt with section emojis the model emits in its markdown response. _get_cached_stock + _normalize_dividend_yield + _build_stock_dict deliver 8-field schema, dividendYield correctly normalized to decimal (0-1), volume formatted as 'NN.NM' string, sector='Technology' for AAPL — second call cache hit verified.
Math regression spec-exact: Long Call $150/$5 fee=0.65 → maxProfit=4749.35, maxLoss=-500.65, totalFees=0.65, BE=[155.0]. No drift after refactor.

Stripe pipeline 100%: 7 plan/payment combos + invalid_plan 400 + auth gate + checkout/status flow + webhook endpoint reachable. transaction_id/checkout_url(https://checkout.stripe.com/...)/session_id(cs_test_...) all returned correctly for plan_id=monthly+payment_method=card. _build_pending_transaction + _create_stripe_session + _stripe_session_ids + _activate_paid_subscription helpers all integrated.

Code-review nit: PaymentCancelPage uses `t('key') || 'Fallback'` which is a misuse of the i18n contract — t() returns the key as placeholder (truthy) so the fallback never executes for genuinely missing keys. This caused 2/4 strings to leak as raw keys. Reusing this pattern in other pages risks the same bug; consider standardizing to t('key', {defaultValue}) or wrapping with a helper.
test_demo_login in test_trading_calculator.py:71 has `return token` which fires PytestReturnNotNoneWarning — minor cleanup: use a fixture instead of returning from a test. Not blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_p3.py (NEW: 6 tests covering options/unusual, options/market-flow, options/ai-analyze, stock/AAPL+cache, stripe webhook reachability)

success_rate.backend: 100% (52/52 tests passing — 8 P1 + 10 P2 + 6 P3 NEW + 15 Stripe + 13 base)
success_rate.frontend: Partial: /payment/cancel renders without React runtime ReferenceError (the original bug is fixed, 0 console errors), BUT 2/4 fallback strings leak as raw i18n keys (paymentCancelledTitle_pc01, viewPlans_pc02). Page is functional but visually broken.

seed_data_creation: None (test_refactor_p3 reuses live demo user + market data from yfinance/Stripe test mode).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Main agent fix needed: add 2 missing i18n keys (paymentCancelledTitle_pc01, viewPlans_pc02) to /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js for all 9 langs (use the same translations as the action_items suggest, or simpler: hardcode in PaymentCancelPage.jsx). After fix, navigate to /payment/cancel and confirm the title shows 'Pago Cancelado' and the green button shows 'Ver Planes' instead of the raw keys. Backend P3 refactor is FULLY GREEN — re-running pytest /app/backend/tests/ should yield 52/52. AI analyze endpoint takes 3-15s (Claude via Emergent LLM Key); market-flow takes ~25s for 24 tickers; allocate timeouts accordingly. Pre-existing LegEditor <span>-in-<option> hydration warning still present (carried from iteration_2/3, NOT a regression).
rca of the issue:
PaymentCancelPage i18n key leak RCA: code at /app/frontend/src/pages/PaymentPages.jsx line 113 `

{t('paymentCancelledTitle_pc01') || 'Pago Cancelado'}

` and line 117 `{t('viewPlans_pc02') || 'Ver Planes'}` rely on JS short-circuit `||`. The translation function in /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js returns the key string itself when the key is missing (typical i18next behavior), which is a non-empty truthy string, so the right-hand fallback never executes. Verified by grep: keys 'paymentCancelledTitle_pc01' and 'viewPlans_pc02' have ZERO matches in i18n.js across all 9 language objects, while 'goToDashboard' and 'hasCanceladoElProcesoDe_c37e10' have 9 matches each (one per language) — that's why those two render correctly while the other two leak as raw keys. Mitigation: add the 2 missing keys to all 9 language dictionaries (preferred for consistency) OR replace `||` pattern with `t('key') !== 'paymentCancelledTitle_pc01' ? t('key') : 'Pago Cancelado'` OR hardcode the labels (since the title is fixed semantic content).
